message:
chore: sync beads and add Deserialize derive to scenario runner

Minor housekeeping:
- Beads issue tracker timestamp refresh
- scenario_runner.rs: derive Deserialize alongside Serialize for
  round-trip deserialization support in test scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -99,7 +99,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1f42.3.2","title":"[QA-E2E] Author comprehensive end-user workflow scenarios","description":"Task:
Author granular scenario suites: startup, prompt loop, tool chaining, provider switch, error handling, and session restore.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Each scenario documents expected state transitions and failure signatures.
- Each scenario defines expected log checkpoints/fields so diagnostics quality is testable (not subjective).
- Scenario metadata links directly to replay artifacts and failure dossier generation paths.","notes":"Claimed via bv/br triage by FuchsiaLynx; implementing comprehensive end-user e2e workflow scenarios with structured log checkpoints and replay-artifact linkage.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"FuchsiaLynx","owner":"FuchsiaLynx","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:44:57.147985974Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T06:39:47.805161066Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T06:39:47.805068724Z","close_reason":"Completed: scenario suites + structured boundaries + replay artifacts + clippy-clean validation","due_at":"2026-02-19T15:00:00Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:40.723549041Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":947,"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"COMPLETED: Authored 16 comprehensive E2E workflow scenarios across 8 suites:

Suite 1 - Startup: startup_normal, startup_no_session
Suite 2 - Slash Commands: slash_command_workflow, unknown_slash_command
Suite 3 - Error Handling: error_api_failure (VCR 500), exit_ctrl_d, exit_ctrl_c
Suite 4 - Session Persistence: session_persistence_and_tree (JSONL verification), session_restore_explicit_path
Suite 5 - Tool Chaining: tool_chain_read_response (VCR), tool_chain_multi_turn
Suite 6 - Prompt Loop: prompt_loop_multi_round (VCR 2-exchange cassette)
Suite 7 - Provider: provider_switch_missing_key, runner_help_command
Suite 8 - Batch/Transcript: batch_execution (distinct run IDs), transcript_diff_self_compare

All tests use CliScenario/ScenarioRunner pattern with structured transcripts.
VCR cassettes written dynamically for API-dependent tests.
TranscriptDiff validation in transcript_diff_self_compare.
Transcript invariant checks (run_id, correlation_ids, event boundaries, artifacts).
All clippy and compilation checks pass cleanly.","created_at":"2026-02-10T06:39:41Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1f42.3.3","title":"[QA-E2E] Add structured diagnostics and artifact capture","description":"Task:
Add detailed structured logging for e2e runs (trace IDs, step logs, command I/O, provider event timeline).

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every failing scenario emits a compact human-readable summary plus raw machine artifacts.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:44:57.359239930Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:02.473842336Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:02.473819984Z","close_reason":"Merged into bd-1f42.3.6 to unify e2e logging contract + structured diagnostics/artifact capture","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:41.017614575Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:32.264744070Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1f42.3.4","title":"[QA-E2E] Failure replay tooling for deterministic triage","description":"Task:
Implement deterministic replay tooling to reproduce failing e2e runs from saved artifacts, including deterministic control capture (seed/time/env).

Acceptance Criteria:
- One-command local replay reproduces the failure class with the same scenario input.
- Replay artifacts persist seed, time-mode, and relevant environment snapshot used by the failing run.
- Replay command can explicitly rehydrate deterministic controls and detect divergence drift.
- Replay output links directly to structured logs and transcript diffs for root-cause analysis.","notes":"ETA 2026-02-19. Next action: finalize scenario corpus, versioned logging contract, replay tooling, and soak stability metrics.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazForest","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:44:57.564038630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T06:56:52.848535339Z","due_at":"2026-02-19T15:00:00Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:24:48.572141051Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:32.493335495Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":937,"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Planning merge note: absorbed deterministic control capture scope from bd-1f42.3.7. Replay ownership is centralized here to keep deterministic reproduction and drift detection in one implementation path.","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:29Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-1f42.3.5","title":"[QA-E2E] Long-run soak tests with stability metrics","description":"Task:
Create long-run soak e2e tests covering prolonged sessions, repeated tool calls, and memory/resource stability.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Soak reports include leak indicators, latency drift, and failure timeline.
- Structured timeline logs capture periodic resource snapshots and event correlation IDs throughout the run.
- Soak failures produce concise summaries plus full raw artifacts for deep diagnostics.","notes":"ETA 2026-02-19. Next action: finalize scenario corpus, versioned logging contract, replay tooling, and soak stability metrics.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazForest","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:44:57.774966008Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T04:06:28.446035692Z","due_at":"2026-02-19T15:00:00Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:41.672232895Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:21.960006480Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1f42.3.5","title":"[QA-E2E] Long-run soak tests with stability metrics","description":"Task:
Create long-run soak e2e tests covering prolonged sessions, repeated tool calls, and memory/resource stability.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Soak reports include leak indicators, latency drift, and failure timeline.
- Structured timeline logs capture periodic resource snapshots and event correlation IDs throughout the run.
- Soak failures produce concise summaries plus full raw artifacts for deep diagnostics.","notes":"ETA 2026-02-19. Next action: finalize scenario corpus, versioned logging contract, replay tooling, and soak stability metrics.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazForest","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:44:57.774966008Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T06:57:21.440073577Z","due_at":"2026-02-19T15:00:00Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:41.672232895Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:21.960006480Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1f42.3.6","title":"[QA-E2E] Versioned logging contract + transcript diff tooling","description":"Task:
Define and implement a versioned e2e logging contract that includes structured diagnostics, artifact capture, and transcript diff tooling for high-signal failures.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every e2e step emits structured events with correlation IDs and timestamps.
- Logs include command/tool/provider event timelines with machine-parse stability guarantees.
- Logs are secret-safe with automatic redaction and deterministic field ordering where feasible.
- Every failing scenario emits both a compact human-readable summary and raw machine artifacts.
- Failure triage includes deterministic transcript diff against expected traces.","notes":"ETA 2026-02-19. Next action: finalize scenario corpus, versioned logging contract, replay tooling, and soak stability metrics.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazForest","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:32.851390127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T06:45:04.145613358Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T06:45:04.145494406Z","due_at":"2026-02-19T15:00:00Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:32.050884567Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":936,"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Planning merge note: absorbed scope from bd-1f42.3.3. This bead is now the single canonical owner for e2e logging contract, structured diagnostics payloads, and artifact capture semantics.","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:29Z"},{"id":948,"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Note from Opus agent: The transcript diff tooling required by this bead was implemented as part of bd-1f42.3.2. Key deliverables:

1. tests/common/transcript_diff.rs (529 lines):
   - TranscriptDiff::compare() for expected vs actual trace comparison
   - Severity-aware diff reporting (label/success/action/timing)
   - failure_summary() for compact human-readable failure output
   - JSONL output via write_jsonl()
   - Schema-versioned transcript format (TRANSCRIPT_SCHEMA v1.0)

2. tests/common/scenario_runner.rs (844 lines):
   - CliScenario/ScenarioRunner declarative framework
   - Structured JSONL transcripts with correlation IDs
   - Event boundaries (step_start/step_end) with monotonic timestamps
   - Artifact capture (scenario-transcript.jsonl)
   - Secret-safe design (uses VCR redaction)

Both modules are exported from tests/common/mod.rs and used by 16 E2E scenarios in e2e_tui.rs.","created_at":"2026-02-10T06:42:31Z"},{"id":949,"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Closing: All acceptance criteria verified as met by transcript diff and scenario runner tooling committed in bd-1f42.3.2 (ce3cb5be).

AC verification:
1. ✅ Structured events with correlation IDs + timestamps → CorrelationId(run_id/step_index) + EventBoundary in scenario_runner.rs
2. ✅ Command/tool/provider event timelines, machine-parse stable → JSONL with pi.test.transcript.v1 schema, alphabetic field ordering
3. ✅ Secret-safe with automatic redaction → VCR redaction infrastructure, deterministic field ordering
4. ✅ Compact human-readable + raw machine artifacts → failure_summary() + write_jsonl() + scenario-transcript.jsonl per run
5. ✅ Deterministic transcript diff → TranscriptDiff::compare() with DiffSeverity (Critical/Warning/Info)

Modules: tests/common/transcript_diff.rs (529 lines), tests/common/scenario_runner.rs (844 lines)
Exported from tests/common/mod.rs, exercised by 16 E2E scenarios.","created_at":"2026-02-10T06:44:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1f42.3.7","title":"[QA-E2E] Deterministic replay controls (seed/time/env capture)","description":"Task:
Make e2e failures reproducible by capturing deterministic controls (random seed, clock behavior, environment snapshot).

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every e2e artifact includes seed, time-mode, and relevant environment metadata.
- Replay command reproduces behavior with identical deterministic controls.
- Drift detection flags non-deterministic divergences explicitly.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:32.811395676Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:02.678554801Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:02.678531398Z","close_reason":"Merged into bd-1f42.3.4 so deterministic controls are owned by replay tooling","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.3.7","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:33.298458094Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1f42.4","title":"[QA-TRACK] 208-Extension End-to-End Validation Matrix","description":"Objective:
Guarantee that all must-pass extensions (200+) execute correctly under e2e conditions with strict pass/fail reporting.

Deliverables:
- Canonical extension manifest, fixture corpus, matrix executor, CI gate, and daily delta report.
- Per-extension structured logs, reproducible failure dossiers, and clear user-journey diagnostics.","notes":"ETA 2026-02-21. Next action: finish 208-extension fixtures, sharded executor, CI must-pass gate, compatibility matrix, and failure dossiers.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"OrangeBarn","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:44:57.982346898Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T04:06:41.004961247Z","due_at":"2026-02-21T15:00:00Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:45.934782631Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:46.124760525Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:46.336337952Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:46.520696439Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:46.702351761Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:42:46.898991194Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:36.543121048Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1f42.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1f42.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:46:36.791972823Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
